quoted_status.full_text:
Anthropic just published a support page that should terrify anyone holding its shares on the secondary market.

"Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, that has not been approved by our Board of Directors is void and will not be recognized on our books and records."

Void. Not restricted. Not pending review. Void.

That means if you bought Anthropic shares through Forge, Hiive, or any other secondary platform without board approval, you are not a stockholder. You have no stockholder rights. Your transaction is invalid.

It gets worse. Anthropic says it does not permit SPVs to hold its stock. Any transfer to an SPV is void. Investment funds claiming to offer indirect exposure are "most likely relying on mechanisms that attempt to circumvent our transfer restrictions." Forward contracts, tokenized securities, synthetic exposure products, all of it potentially worthless.

Their advice to investors: "Assume that it is invalid."

There is a multi-billion dollar secondary market in Anthropic shares right now. Platforms are pricing the stock at $265-$1,400+ per share based on a $380 billion valuation. Real people have put real money into these positions. And Anthropic just told them none of it counts.

This is the purest possible illustration of counterparty risk. You can buy a share of a company and have the company itself declare your ownership void because you bought it through the wrong channel.

tweets.full_text:
Do you understand what just happened in the last 5 days?

Anthropic and OpenAI both launched joint ventures to embed thousands of engineers directly inside the world's biggest companies. within a week of each other.

OpenAI announced the OpenAI Deployment Company today. $4 billion. 19 investment partners. valued at $10 billion. 

they acquired Tomoro, an AI consulting firm, bringing 150 forward deployed engineers from day one.

Anthropic announced its own venture last week with Blackstone, Goldman Sachs, and Hellman & Friedman. roughly $1 billion. same playbook.

this is the Palantir model. embed your engineers inside companies, rebuild workflows around your product, create a dependency that lasts for years. 

Palantir's stock tripled after executing this.

→ for every $1 companies spend on software, they spend $6 on services 
→ the AI services market is worth roughly $375 billion → private equity firms are the target because they own thousands of companies and can force adoption faster than any public board 
→ enterprise already makes up 40% of OpenAI's revenue, expected to match consumer by end of 2026

the AI lab race has moved past model quality. the competition now is who gets deepest into enterprise infrastructure first and locks in those relationships before the market consolidates.

follow the money.

tweets.full_text:
Anthropic built Mythos: found thousands of zero-days across every major OS and browser. So dangerous they won’t release it publicly. Committed $100M in usage credits to defensive security efforts.

OpenAI built Daybreak: frontier AI for cyber defenders, combining their models with Codex.
On paper these look like competing products. They’re not.

Mythos is a research finding that something crossed a threshold. Daybreak is a product. One is Anthropic saying “this capability exists and it’s serious enough that we’re treating it as a coordinated global security event.” The other is OpenAI saying “here’s a tool for your security team.”

Very different levels of alarm. Worth paying attention to which one is more scared of what they built.

user.name: Tec99
user.description: Loading 99% of Technology....

tweets.full_text:
用 Claude MCP 搭一个链上监控机器人

AI 和链上数据的结合，是我最近在关注的方向。

核心驱动是 MCP——Model Context Protocol。Anthropic 推出的协议，让 Claude 可以直接调用外部工具和 API。

MCP 的意义很简单：原来 Claude 只能靠训练数据回答问题，现在它能实时查数据了。

而链上数据是目前最适合接 MCP 的场景之一。

能做什么

一句话：让 Claude 替你盯着链上。

▸ 监控某个地址的大额转账，到了阈值自动通知
▸ 查询任意地址的持仓变化
▸ 跟踪新代币的部署和交易量
▸ 对比跨链资金流动

所有这些，用自然语言问就行。不用写 SQL，不用搭数据库。

现在有哪些工具可用

Dune MCP Server

Dune 官方出了 MCP 接口，覆盖 100 多条链。AI agent 可以直接查 Dune 的数据库，写查询、拿结果、生成图表，一条龙。

功能：12 个工具接口，包括表查询、结果导出、图表生成
入口：Dune 官方文档搜 MCP
费用：Dune 免费套餐可用

Bitquery MCP

40 多条链的实时数据和历史数据。支持内存池监控、交易查询、指标聚合。

功能：实时流数据 + 结构化查询
入口：Composio 平台接入

QuickNode MCP

让你用自然语言管理区块链节点。创建端点、查用量、配安全策略，都不用进控制台。

功能：节点管理、用量监控、安全配置
入口：QuickNode 官方文档

evmcp

开源的 MCP 协议实现，28 个只读工具，覆盖 Base、Optimism、Avalanche、Celo、Arbitrum 五条链。
特色是把工具注册信息直接写到了链上合约里——智能合约即接口文档。

功能：余额查询、代币查询、交易解码、Gas 对比、ENS 解析
入口：npm 搜 evmcp

一个实际例子

假设你想监控某个地址的 ETH 转账。

以前的做法：写一个脚本，接 Alchemy 或者 Infura 的 WebSocket，解析交易日志，存数据库，再写通知逻辑。一个周末搭完。

现在用 MCP：在 Claude 里连上 Blocknative MCP，说"帮我监控地址 0xXXX，单笔超过 10 ETH 的转账通知我"。

就一句话。

当然背后还是有服务在跑，但从你的角度看，配置成本的差距是巨大的。

适合什么场景

如果你是开发者，evmcp 和 QuickNode MCP 可以直接嵌入你的工作流。

如果你是交易者或分析师，Dune MCP 和 Bitquery MCP 让你用对话就能查链上数据。

如果你是撸毛党，监控新合约部署和项目交互是最直接的用例。

MCP 现在还很早期，接口在快速迭代中。

但方向已经很清楚了链上数据的查询门槛正在被AI大幅降低。
